title: Freshly Prepared Brazilian Linguine Pasta
description: A light and festive Brazilian dish featuring linguine pasta, with a citrusy flavor and al-dente finish, perfect for vegetarians. This dish is easy to make and can be prepared in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine pasta according to package instructions until al-dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the orange and lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and cook for 1 minute.
Drain the cooked linguine pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the sauce.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional chopped cilantro if desired.
